rewards.title: Ecosystem
rewards.intro: Official campaigns and rewards are aggregated here. Use your connected EVM wallet for shopping and checkout; more features will ship iteratively.
rewards.walletExplainer: Shopping and checkout on Sapphire Mall only require an EVM wallet (e.g. MetaMask).
rewards.plannedHint: Task claims and reward summaries are on the roadmap. You can still earn contribution via DAO votes and community tasks until launch.
rewards.heroSubtitle: Official campaigns and community rewards—earn contribution points, limited NFTs, and platform perks.
rewards.walletNoticeBody: Connect an EVM wallet (e.g. MetaMask) to shop and join on-site campaigns. Rules and rewards are shown on each campaign page.

campaignDetail.notFound: Campaign not found—it may have ended or the link is invalid.
campaignDetail.claimSuccess: Claim recorded (demo). Head to the marketplace to use your perk.

walletHints.evm: Use an EVM wallet (e.g. MetaMask) on Sapphire Mall to participate or claim.
walletHints.evm_optional: An EVM wallet is recommended to track contribution; some tasks can be browsed without connecting.

newbie-wallet.title: First wallet connect bonus
newbie-wallet.desc: New users who connect an EVM wallet and complete verification receive a 10 USDT-equivalent voucher.
rules: For new Sapphire Mall users who have not claimed this perk before.
Requires an EVM wallet and platform verification.
Voucher expires 7 days after claim and is non-transferable.
steps: Connect MetaMask or another EVM wallet and sign in.
Return here to claim, then use the voucher when you shop.

sap-pay-bonus.title: SAP payment cashback
sap-pay-bonus.desc: Pay mall orders with SAP for extra fee discounts and cashback during the campaign window.
rules: Orders paid with SAP during the campaign count toward cashback.
Rewards are issued in SAP; caps and rates are shown on the campaign page.
Abuse or suspicious volume may void eligibility.
steps: Ensure your wallet holds enough SAP.
Shop and choose SAP at checkout.
Cashback appears on the order or account after payment (demo timing).

referral.title: Sapphire referral partner program
referral.desc: Invite friends to complete their first trade on Sapphire Mall and earn 20% of their lifetime fees.
rules: Invitees must register via your link and complete a qualifying first trade.
Commission is 20% and paid on the platform schedule.
Self-referrals and fake signups are prohibited.
steps: Get your referral link from the help center.
Share it and help friends register and trade.
Commission accrues after their first qualifying trade (demo).

node-mining.title: Node contribution mining
node-mining.desc: Complete daily and purchase tasks to grow contribution score—higher tiers unlock bigger fee discounts.
rules: Daily tasks have caps; duplicate low-value actions do not count.
Scores apply to this campaign tier only.
Tier perks apply after the next settlement cycle.
steps: Review your tier and fee discount summary.

dao-may.title: May community governance vote
dao-may.desc: Vote on next-quarter upgrades and catalog priorities. Active voters share a 5,000 SAP reward pool.
rules: Voting weight rules are shown on the DAO page.
One vote per address per proposal.
Rewards ship within 7 business days after voting ends (demo).
steps: Connect an EVM wallet and open DAO governance.
Read the proposal and cast your vote.
Track results on the DAO page.

staking-preview.title: Exchange staking preview
staking-preview.desc: Staking and yield views are coming to the exchange module—stay tuned.
rules: Preview only; final staking rules ship in a later release.
Slots may be limited when live.
EVM wallet required to register interest.
steps: Visit the exchange page to learn SAP swaps.

rewards.futureDesc: Task claims and automated reward summaries are in development. Keep earning via DAO votes and community tasks until launch.
rewards.subscribeDesc: Get email alerts for new campaigns and drops (demo).
rewards.subscribeToast: Subscriptions are coming soon—thanks for your interest.
rewards.heroHint: Connect an EVM wallet to join on-site campaigns and checkout.
rewards.myActivityEmpty: Claims will appear here after you join campaigns (demo data).
